top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: GoGold gets green light to build $227M mine in Mexico
top_signals.summary: Los Ricos South is envisioned to be a 15-year mine with the capacity to produce of 80 million oz. of payable silver-equivalent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Judge blocks Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee
top_signals.summary: Trump had imposed the $100,000 fee in order to restrict the program, arguing that it has undermined U.S. security through the "replacement of American workers."

top_signals.title: Antofagasta to spend $900M extending Zaldívar mine to 2051
top_signals.summary: The investment will replace freshwater use with treated wastewater by 2028, creating 5,000 construction jobs.
